name: Elements Financial
description_short: Elements Financial is a member-owned credit union serving over 100,000 members with $2.2B in assets, offering banking products with lower rates and fewer fees than traditional banks.
description_long: Elements Financial Federal Credit Union was established in 1930 and has grown to serve employees of over 150 companies across the U.S., with deep roots in Central Indiana. Originally founded to serve Eli Lilly employees, the credit union has expanded significantly while maintaining its non-profit, member-owned structure that prioritizes returning profits to members rather than external shareholders. The organization is ranked among the top 5% of credit unions nationally with more than 100,000 members and $2.2 billion in assets. Elements Financial offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards. Members have access to 90,000+ surcharge-free ATMs and 5,000+ shared branches worldwide through the CO-OP network. The credit union provides online banking, live chat support, and digital services alongside traditional branch banking. Current promotional offerings include auto loan rates as low as 4.94% APR and 18-month certificates with 3.15% APY. The company also maintains a referral program offering $50 rewards and emphasizes financial wellness through educational workshops and resources. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Elements Financial's distinguishing characteristic is its member-ownership model, which directly translates to better rates, lower fees, and higher savings yields compared to for-profit institutions. The organization balances high-tech digital banking with 24/7 human support, explicitly rejecting a cold, purely automated approach. Elements demonstrates community commitment through annual "Purpose Day" volunteer initiatives and membership in national protection initiatives like the Member Protection Initiative for scam prevention. The credit union's 90+ year history and top 5% ranking indicate operational stability and member satisfaction. Elements Financial is legitimately well-positioned for members seeking banking services with member-first values and competitive rates. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is employment-based—you must work for one of the 150+ employer-partners to join, which limits accessibility compared to banks open to the general public. Those who qualify gain genuine advantages through the non-profit structure, but the company is not an option for consumers outside its employer network.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Non-profit, member-owned structure returns profits as lower fees, higher savings rates, and lower loan rates
Ranked in top 5% of U.S. credit unions with 100,000+ members and $2.2 billion in assets
Access to 90,000+ surcharge-free ATMs and 5,000+ shared branches worldwide
Competitive promotional rates: auto loans as low as 4.94% APR and CDs at 3.15% APY
24/7 human support combined with modern digital banking and online services
90+ year operational history since 1930 with deep community roots in Central Indiana
Active in national member protection initiatives to prevent scams and fraud
cons: Membership is employment-restricted—limited to employees of 150+ participating companies, not open to general public
Website does not disclose overdraft fees, foreign transaction fees, or other standard banking charges for comparison
Limited information on credit card rewards programs, APRs, or features compared to competitors
Auto loan promotional rate requires preauthorized transfer setup and may not apply to all applicants based on credit history
No mention of business banking services despite focus on employee benefits
best_for: Employees of Eli Lilly or the 150+ partnering companies seeking lower-fee banking with member-owned benefits
Members prioritizing community-focused banking with active local volunteer engagement and financial wellness education
Auto loan borrowers with good to excellent credit (FICO 790+) seeking rates below traditional bank offerings
Savers interested in competitive certificate of deposit rates with guaranteed APY
diagnosis: Elements Financial is best for employees of participating companies (especially Eli Lilly) who want banking products with genuinely lower fees and rates thanks to credit union ownership. The major caveat is that membership is employment-restricted—you cannot join unless you work for one of their 150+ employer-partners, which makes this unavailable to the general public despite offering excellent member benefits.
services: Checking accounts with online banking access
Savings accounts with higher rates than traditional banks
Auto loans for purchase and refinancing (rates from 4.94% APR)
Mortgages for home purchase and refinancing
Loan payment services and account management
ATM and branch locator (90,000+ surcharge-free ATMs, 5,000+ branches)
Financial wellness resources and educational workshops
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Elements Financial is a member-owned credit union with 100,000+ members offering banking products with lower rates and fewer fees than traditional banks.
